title: D.C. police union blames police-reform law for dismissal of 12 cops
shortDescription: The local police union said 21 officers would not have their contracts renewed come April 30. Twelve of those were thanks to a controversial law, they said.

title: President Biden says he is happy to debate Trump
shortDescription: President Biden told radio talk show host Howard Stern Friday that he plans to debate Donald Trump in the 2024 campaign.

title: Trump's week of split screen court moments | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Protests continue on college campuses over the war in Gaza. NY appeals court has overturned Harvey Weinstein's 2020 rape conviction.

title: Trump trial Day 8 recap: prosecution calls Michael Cohen's banker
shortDescription: The prosecution began examining its third witness in former President Donald Trump's Manhattan criminal hush money coverup trial.

title: Constitutional law and a billionaire's dirty laundry: Trump's split screen
shortDescription: There was no mistaking the elevated tone at the Supreme Court, nor the tawdry nature of the testimony in New York. A look at Trump's split screen.

title: Fake electors in Arizona: How Trump's alleged scheme worked
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump and several of his allies are facing criminal charges for allegedly trying to recruit and pose as fake electors.

title: Judge didn't say Trump missed his children's graduations | Fact checks
shortDescription: Merchan didn't say anything like this to Trump. He said he would consider adjourning for a day as long as the trial wasn't running behind schedule.

title: SCOTUS to decide if an abortion ban violates federal law | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: A grand jury has charged Arizona Republicans and former aides to Donald Trump in a scheme to falsely claim he won the state in 2020.

title: This story is true: Enquirer editor on Trump affair with Stormy Daniels
shortDescription: National Enquirer editor Dylan Howard texted David Pecker about Stormy Daniels, saying her affair with Donald Trump was a true story, texts show.

title: Trump motion for new E. Jean Carroll trial denied by judge
shortDescription: Donald Trump's attempt to avoid paying advice columnist E. Jean Carroll millions in defamation damages was rejected Thursday.

title: Pecker recalls Trump saying 'Karen is a nice girl' in hush money trial
shortDescription: Former National Enquirer exec David Pecker testified about what led the publication to buy Karen McDougal's story about her alleged affair with Trump.
